description_long: This house features a large, rectangular main building with a flat green roof, flanked by two symmetrical wings that also have flat green roofs. The front facade is adorned with tall, narrow windows and a central entryway, framed by manicured trees and shrubs, and accessed via a short set of steps. The property includes a paved driveway and parking area, with a single car visible, and is bordered by low walls. The landscaping is formal, with evenly spaced trees and hedges, and the outdoor areas are organized into distinct sections. The rear and side views reveal additional outdoor spaces, possibly patios or terraces, enclosed by low fencing. The overall design is modern and minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with symmetrical wings, manicured landscaping, and a central entryway framed by tall windows and trees. The property includes a driveway, parking area, and formal outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical landscaping, driveway, and parking area with a car.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the side wing, garage area, and additional landscaping details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roofs of the main building and wings, with enclosed outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the opposite wing, garage, and more of the formal garden layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, flanked by tall narrow windows and manicured trees, no porch or overhang.
